stream.$comment: Optional props if source is set to 'stream'.

gfn.$comment: Required props if source is set to 'gfn'.

local.$comment: DATE Phase 0.5 — defaults to date-viewer-streaming on :49102 (clean customer-facing kit-app build, no Composer authoring chrome). For Composer (the Twin Architect's authoring tool) use ?stream_port=49100 query-param escape hatch.
